g.text: Adjust the engine RPM and the
collective pitch of the spinning blades.
and the wing's angle to the wind.

span.style: background-color: #e11d48; color: white; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 15px;

div.p: Generates lift by actively spinning blades (airfoils) through the air using an engine. Because the blades create their own relative wind, the aircraft does not need to move forward to fly. This allows for vertical takeoff, landing, and hovering. Lift is controlled by adjusting the rotor RPM and the collective pitch (angle) of all blades simultaneously.
